scripts.test: node --test -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register test/config/**/*.test.ts test/models/**/*.test.ts test/tools/**/*.test.ts test/utils/**/*.test.ts
scripts.test:it: npm run build && mvn -f java-agent\pom.xml -pl core/core-probe -am package -DskipTests && mvn -f test\fixtures\spring-apps\social-platform\pom.xml -pl post-service/post-app -am package -DskipTests && node --test --test-concurrency=1 -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register test/integration/**/*.it.test.ts
scripts.test:it:java-agent: npm run build && mvn -f java-agent\pom.xml -pl core/core-probe -am package -DskipTests && mvn -f test\fixtures\spring-apps\social-platform\pom.xml -pl post-service/post-app -am package -DskipTests && node --test --test-concurrency=1 -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register test/integration/java-agent/**/*.it.test.ts
scripts.test:it:mcp: npm run build && mvn -f java-agent\pom.xml -pl core/core-probe -am package -DskipTests && mvn -f test\fixtures\spring-apps\social-platform\pom.xml -pl post-service/post-app -am package -DskipTests && node --test --test-concurrency=1 -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register test/integration/mcp/**/*.it.test.ts
